tagline: A sharper, greener, healthier lawn — start to finish. Mowing, flowerbed beautification, and seasonal fertilization from a trusted, locally owned Jonesboro crew.
rating_blurb: Rated 4.9 across 57 reviews — Jonesboro's trusted, locally owned lawn care crew
services_intro: Recurring mowing, flowerbed and landscape beautification, and targeted seasonal fertilization for homes across Jonesboro — one dependable, locally owned crew that leaves your property sharp, green, and full of curb appeal.
service_1_desc: Regular mowing, crisp edging, and trimming that keeps your yard clean and healthy all season long.
service_2_desc: Bed cleanups, planting, and detailing that bring color and curb appeal to your property.
service_3_desc: Targeted seasonal fertilizer applications for thicker, greener, weed-resistant turf year round.
about_paragraph: Lott's Lawn Care Service is a locally owned lawn care and landscaping company based in Jonesboro, Georgia. From dependable recurring mowing and maintenance to flowerbed beautification and targeted seasonal fertilization, we handle everything that keeps a property sharp, green, and full of curb appeal. You talk to the crew that does the work — our pricing is straightforward, and our standard is the same on every yard: clean lines, healthy turf, and a property you're proud of. With a 4.9-star rating across 57 reviews, Jonesboro homeowners trust Lott's to get it right. Give us a call to set up a free quote.
proof_note: Rating 4.9 and review count 57 verified across Google Maps, Birdeye, BBB, and Nextdoor listings. Sources: Google Maps (data=...0x88f4fa6ebb01ce47), reviews.birdeye.com/lotts-lawn-care-service-156227231747450, bbb.org Jonesboro profile 0443-28141088, us.nextdoor.com/pages/lotts-lawn-care-service-jonesboro-ga. Phone (678) 468-4952 and address 317 Fieldgreen Dr, Jonesboro, GA 30238 confirmed.
